title: ARCHIVED - Family Violence Prevention Resources: Family Violence - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Family Violence Prevention Resources: Family Violence
This section lists publications addressing family violence generally. Interchangeable terms may include domestic violence and intimate partner violence or intimate partner abuse ( Disclaimer ).
- Information sheets, Booklets & Fact Sheets
- Need help dealing with family violence?
- Learn about family violence
- Resources for professionals
- Promoting safe relationships
- Funding opportunities
- Family Violence Initiative
- Provinces and Territories
